serverInfo.name: sap.mcp/metadata_management_cloud_edition
serverInfo.title: metadata_management_cloud_edition
serverInfo.description: MCP server for the metadata_management_cloud_edition service.

tools.name: searchCatalogAssets
tools.title: searchCatalogAssets
tools.description: Search for data assets in the catalog with full-text search and filter support

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Asset type filter (e.g. VIEW, TABLE, DATAFLOW)

tools.name: getCatalogAsset
tools.title: getCatalogAsset
tools.description: Returns full metadata for a specific catalog asset including business description, tags, lineage and glossary terms

tools.name: updateCatalogAssetMetadata
tools.title: updateCatalogAssetMetadata
tools.description: Updates business metadata fields (description, tags, glossary terms, custom attributes) for a catalog asset

tools.name: getAssetLineage
tools.title: getAssetLineage
tools.description: Returns the data lineage graph showing upstream sources and downstream consumers

tools.name: listGlossaryTerms
tools.title: listGlossaryTerms
tools.description: Returns all business glossary terms available for tagging data assets

tools.name: createGlossaryTerm
tools.title: createGlossaryTerm
tools.description: Creates a new business glossary term in the catalog

tools.name: listTags
tools.title: listTags
tools.description: Returns all available tags that can be applied to catalog assets

tools.name: setAssetTags
tools.title: setAssetTags
tools.description: Replaces all tags on a catalog asset with the provided set
